SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlottery

Class EventFilterCriteria

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlottery.EventFilterCriteria
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class EventFilterCriteria extends Object implements Serializable
This class holds entrant-side filter criteria for the event list and map screens. It is Serializable so it can be passed between activities.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    EventFilterCriteria()
    Creates a new EventFilterCriteria with all fields at their default (no filtering).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    clear()
    Clears all filter constraints so defaults apply on each screen.
    static EventFilterCriteria
    empty()
    Returns a new criteria instance with all fields at default (no filtering beyond screen rules).
    String
    getEventType()
    Returns the selected event type filter.
    String
    getKeyword()
    Returns the keyword used to match event title or description.
    Double
    getMaxDistanceKm()
    Returns the maximum distance filter in kilometers, if set.
    boolean
    isRegistrationOpenOnly()
    Returns whether only events with open registration should appear (list screen).
    void
    setEventType(String eventType)
    Sets the event type filter (trimmed).
    void
    setKeyword(String keyword)
    Sets the search keyword (trimmed).
    void
    setMaxDistanceKm(Double maxDistanceKm)
    Sets the maximum distance from the user position (km).
    void
    setRegistrationOpenOnly(boolean registrationOpenOnly)
    Sets whether to restrict the list to events with registration currently open.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • EventFilterCriteria

      public EventFilterCriteria()
      Creates a new EventFilterCriteria with all fields at their default (no filtering).

  • Method Details

    • getKeyword

      public String getKeyword()
      Returns the keyword used to match event title or description.
      Returns:
      trimmed keyword, or empty string

    • setKeyword

      public void setKeyword(String keyword)
      Sets the search keyword (trimmed).
      Parameters:
      keyword - text to match; null becomes empty

    • getEventType

      public String getEventType()
      Returns the selected event type filter.
      Returns:
      event type label, or empty string for no type filter

    • setEventType

      public void setEventType(String eventType)
      Sets the event type filter (trimmed).
      Parameters:
      eventType - type label or empty / "Any type" for no filter

    • getMaxDistanceKm

      public Double getMaxDistanceKm()
      Returns the maximum distance filter in kilometers, if set.
      Returns:
      max distance in km, or null when distance filter is off

    • setMaxDistanceKm

      public void setMaxDistanceKm(Double maxDistanceKm)
      Sets the maximum distance from the user position (km). Use null to disable.
      Parameters:
      maxDistanceKm - positive distance in km, or null

    • isRegistrationOpenOnly

      public boolean isRegistrationOpenOnly()
      Returns whether only events with open registration should appear (list screen).
      Returns:
      true if registration-open filter is on

    • setRegistrationOpenOnly

      public void setRegistrationOpenOnly(boolean registrationOpenOnly)
      Sets whether to restrict the list to events with registration currently open.
      Parameters:
      registrationOpenOnly - true to enable the filter

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Clears all filter constraints so defaults apply on each screen.

    • empty

      public static EventFilterCriteria empty()
      Returns a new criteria instance with all fields at default (no filtering beyond screen rules).
      Returns:
      new empty EventFilterCriteria
